entities.name: Resume Thesis
entities.context: Belief that now is a potentially transformative moment for the resume industry after decades of 'death to resume' predictions

entities.name: Narrative-driven positioning
entities.context: Approach centering authenticity and narrative over traditional resume-centricism

entities.name: Career tech incumbents
entities.context: Existing career technology platforms that refuse to evolve beyond resume-centricism

entities.name: Candidate Self-Promotion Gap
entities.context: Observation that high-credentialed candidates (especially women in education) struggle to market qualitative strengths

entities.name: Narrative coaching
entities.context: Service addressing self-promotion gap with elasticity upmarket into mid-career and executive searches

entities.name: AI
entities.context: Technology enabling creation of perfectly tailored resumes at scale

entities.name: Resume Commoditization
entities.context: Phenomenon where AI-optimized resumes collapse quantity signals and make resume screening useless

entities.name: Community vetting
entities.context: Alternative screening mechanism as higher-signal proxy for hiring quality

entities.name: Reference networks
entities.context: Relationship-based screening mechanism replacing resume-based filtering

entities.name: Resume paradigm
entities.context: Traditional approach to hiring that breaks down as roles become more complex and relationship-based

relationships.context: AI accelerates commoditization by enabling everyone to create perfectly tailored resumes
Narrative approach positioned to disrupt and replace resume-centric model
Narrative coaching addresses the gap between credentials and self-marketing ability
Community vetting emerges as necessary alternative when resume screening becomes useless
Both serve as higher-signal proxies for quality hiring
Incumbents refusing to evolve remain tied to resume-centric approach
